title: The rich keep spending money on ‘unapologetic luxury’ — and it’s raising prices on everyday goods for everyone
summary: Wealthy consumers continue spending on luxury goods despite inflationary pressures, which could complicate the Federal Reserve's efforts to combat inflation. Their sustained high-end consumption may keep demand elevated across the economy, potentially supporting overall price pressures on everyday goods.
content: The wealthy are unfazed by inflation, and that could complicate the Fed’s ability to fight it.

title: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
summary: SpaceX debuted on Nasdaq on Friday and became the sixth most-valuable U.S. company by market capitalization at $2 trillion, despite having significantly lower revenue than other tech giants. The historic IPO marks a major milestone for the aerospace company, which faced only a 10% success chance in its early years.
content: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.

zh.title: 从10%的成功概率到2万亿美元市值:SpaceX的历史性IPO
zh.summary: SpaceX于周五在纳斯达克上市,市值达2万亿美元,成为美国第六大有价值公司,尽管其收入远低于其他科技巨头。这一历史性IPO对于这家在早期只有10%成功概率的航空航天公司来说,标志着一个重大里程碑。

title: Drugmakers race to find a place in the next wave of obesity drugs
summary: Pharmaceutical companies are racing to gain market share in the rapidly growing obesity drug sector, which is currently dominated by Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly. Multiple drugmakers are developing competing treatments to capitalize on surging patient demand for obesity medications.
content: Drugmakers are betting they can crack into the obesity drug market that Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly currently dominate.

zh.title: 制药商竞争在下一波肥胖症药物市场中占据一席之地
zh.summary: 制药公司正在争夺快速增长的肥胖症药物领域的市场份额,该领域目前由诺和诺德和礼来公司主导。多家制药商正在开发相互竞争的治疗方法,以利用患者对肥胖症药物需求的激增。

title: Rivian CEO taking different approach than Elon Musk for humanoid robotics company
summary: Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe launched a separate humanoid robotics company called Mind Robotics last year that has raised over $1 billion in funding. His approach to the robotics venture differs from Elon Musk's strategy in the same sector.
content: Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe started a robotics company late last year called Mind Robotics that he says has has raised more than $1 billion.

zh.title: Rivian CEO在人形机器人公司上采取与埃隆·马斯克不同的策略
zh.summary: Rivian首席执行官RJ·斯卡林奇去年创立了独立的人形机器人公司Mind Robotics，已融资超过10亿美元。他对这家机器人企业的策略与埃隆·马斯克在同一领域的方法不同。

title: Defaults in debt markets are starting again, warns Pimco. Here’s the bond giant’s game plan.
summary: Investment firm Pimco warns that defaults in debt markets are beginning to rise again and cautions investors about stretched equity valuations. The bond giant recommends increasing fixed income allocations to anchor portfolios as economic conditions shift.
content: Investors should increasingly seek out fixed income to anchor portfolios as equity valuations look stretched, says Pimco.

zh.title: Pimco警告债市违约开始重新出现，债券巨头公布应对计划
zh.summary: 投资公司Pimco警告债市违约开始重新增加，并对股票估值过高向投资者发出警告。这家债券巨头建议增加固定收益配置，以在经济形势变化时为投资组合提供支撑。

title: Beijing says it's 'strongly dissatisfied' with Pentagon move against top Chinese tech firms
summary: The Pentagon added multiple Chinese technology companies—including Alibaba, Baidu, and BYD—to a list of entities it believes have aided China's military capabilities. Beijing responded with strong objection, saying it is 'strongly dissatisfied' with the U.S. action.
content: The Pentagon added a slew of Chinese tech firms, including Alibaba, Baidu and BYD, to a list of entities it believes have aided China's military.

zh.title: 北京表示对五角大楼针对中国顶级科技企业的举措"强烈不满"
zh.summary: 五角大楼将包括阿里巴巴、百度和比亚迪在内的多家中国科技公司列入其认为协助中国军事能力的实体名单。北京对美国的这一举措做出了强烈反对，表示"强烈不满"。

title: U.S. opens its home World Cup with a dynamic 4-1 victory over Paraguay, sparked by Balogun's 2 goals
summary: The U.S. national soccer team defeated Paraguay 4-1 in their World Cup home opener with a dominant first-half performance. Forward Balogun scored twice as part of a three-goal barrage before halftime that set the tone for the victory.
content: Balogun scored twice in the Americans' three-goal barrage before halftime in a dynamic 4-1 victory over Paraguay.

zh.title: 美国在主场世界杯开幕战中4-1击败巴拉圭，巴洛贡打进两球立功
zh.summary: 美国国家足球队在世界杯主场揭幕战中以4-1击败巴拉圭，上半场表现占据主导地位。前锋巴洛贡打进两球，上半场三球猛攻的一部分，为胜利奠定了基调。

title: Trump says U.S. military strike killed leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang
summary: President Trump announced that U.S. military forces conducted a strike that killed Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, the leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang. The operation targeted one of the region's most significant criminal organizations.
content: Trump on Friday said U.S. forces carried out a ⁠strike that killed Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, the leader of Venezuelan ​gang Tren de Aragua.

zh.title: 特朗普称美国军事打击击毙委内瑞拉特伦德阿拉瓜帮头目
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布美国军事力量进行了一次打击，击毙了委内瑞拉特伦德阿拉瓜帮的领导人赫克托·鲁斯滕福德·格雷罗·弗洛雷斯。该行动针对该地区最重要的犯罪组织之一。

title: Workers begin removing Trump's name from the Kennedy Center, hours after a court-ordered deadline
summary: Workers began removing Trump's name from the Kennedy Center on Friday, hours after meeting a court-ordered deadline for the removal. Crowds gathered on the plaza to witness the process, with spectators cheering as crews dismantled the signage.
content: Dozens of people spent hours on Friday on the plaza in front of the Kennedy Center, occasionally cheering as they broke into chants of "take it down."

zh.title: 法院截止期限后数小时，工人开始从肯尼迪中心移除特朗普的名字
zh.summary: 周五，在达到法院规定的截止期限后数小时，工人开始从肯尼迪中心移除特朗普的名字。人群聚集在广场上观看这一过程，观众在工作人员拆除标志时欢呼雀跃。

title: UAE denies 'false' reports of fund transfer to Iran
summary: The UAE denied recent reports claiming it had agreed to unlock billions of dollars in frozen funds for Iran. The statement followed a Reuters report detailing the alleged fund transfer agreement between the two nations.
content: The statement follows a Reuters report that the UAE has agreed to unlock billions of dollars of frozen funds for Iran.

zh.title: 阿联酋否认向伊朗转移资金的"虚假"报道
zh.summary: 阿联酋否认了最近关于其同意为伊朗解冻数十亿美元冻结资金的报道。该声明随后发表在路透社关于两国间据称的资金转移协议的报道之后。

title: Switzerland is voting on whether to cap its population at 10 million. Here's what to know
summary: Switzerland is holding a vote on capping population at 10 million, which could restrict immigration and strain its EU free-movement agreement.
content: Switzerland votes on a population cap that could tighten immigration and put its EU free-movement agreement under pressure.

zh.title: 瑞士投票决定是否将人口限制在1000万。以下是你需要了解的内容
zh.summary: 瑞士正在进行投票决定是否将人口上限定在1000万，这可能会限制移民并对其欧盟自由流动协议造成压力。

title: Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with government directive
summary: Anthropic disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models in response to a U.S. government export control directive.
content: Anthropic said it disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with an export control directive from the U.S. government.

zh.title: 为遵守政府指令，Anthropic禁用了Fable 5和Mythos 5的访问
zh.summary: 为遵守美国政府出口管制指令，Anthropic禁用了其Fable 5和Mythos 5模型的访问。
